Header files for analytics services, event logging, data collection, heartbeats, metrics, and storage management.


## Files
- **[analytics.h](analytics.h.md)**: Header file for analytics services, defining functions and types for managing and logging metrics.
- **[analytics_event.h](analytics_event.h.md)**: Defines structures, enums, and functions for logging various analytics events in Pebble firmware.
- **[analytics_external.h](analytics_external.h.md)**: Functions for collecting and updating various analytics data from different system modules.
- **[analytics_heartbeat.h](analytics_heartbeat.h.md)**: Defines data structures and functions for managing and manipulating analytics heartbeats.
- **[analytics_logging.h](analytics_logging.h.md)**: Defines analytics logging functions and types for event handling and testing in firmware.
- **[analytics_metric.h](analytics_metric.h.md)**: Defines analytics metric types, initialization, and utility functions for metric properties.
- **[analytics_metric_table.h](analytics_metric_table.h.md)**: Defines the format and metrics for device and application analytics blobs in the Pebble firmware.
- **[analytics_storage.h](analytics_storage.h.md)**: Header file for managing analytics storage, including heartbeat handling and lock management functions.
